topic: OpenAI Agent Builder Guide: No-Code AI Agents Without the SDK

stats.fact: OpenAI Assistants API deprecated August 26, 2025; sunset date August 26, 2026 — Responses API is now the recommended path for all new agent projects
Klarna's OpenAI-powered support agent handles two-thirds of all customer support tickets
Ramp went from blank canvas to a fully functional buyer agent in a few hours, cutting iteration cycles by 70%
OpenAI Codex CLI reached 1 million developers in its first month after launch
Manual lead-finding workflows take 90% longer than API-driven automation built with Agent Builder
Agent Builder provides 12 distinct workflow node types for composing agentic logic without writing code
OpenAI Responses API includes 5 built-in tools: web search, file search, computer use, code interpreter, and remote MCPs
